name: muhan-web-runner
description: Browser-playable web gateway for MUHAN with an optional Antigravity CLI console.

scripts.check: node --check server/server.js && node --check web/app.js && node --check scripts/wait-for-tcp.js && node --check scripts/healthcheck.js && node --check scripts/smoke-gateway.js && node --check scripts/smoke-agent.js && python3 -m py_compile server/pty_bridge.py
